title: Gelant grabs gold in Belgium, sets sights on Gqeberha title
description: GEORGE NEWS - After a stellar 2024 season,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - After a stellar 2024 season, where he claimed two national titles and proudly represented South Africa in the Olympic marathon, Elroy Gelant is poised for an even bigger 2025.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - After a stellar 2024 season, where he claimed two national titles and proudly represented South Africa in the Olympic marathon, Elroy Gelant is poised for an even bigger 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The three-time Olympian delivered a scintillating performance at the Bashir's Run Half Marathon in Belgium on Sunday 9 March, clocking a lifetime best of 60:22 to secure victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Motivated by this achievement, Gelant is eagerly preparing for his first Absa Run Your City Series race of the year - the Absa Run Your City Gqeberha 10km, taking place on Sunday 13 April.","html":"Motivated by this achievement, Gelant is eagerly preparing for his first Absa Run Your City Series race of the year - the Absa Run Your City Gqeberha 10km, taking place on Sunday 13 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I'm really excited about my performance and I'm feeling optimistic about what lies ahead,\" explains the 38-year-old top runner who is coached by Jean Verster.","html":"\"I'm really excited about my performance and I'm feeling optimistic about what lies ahead,\" explains the 38-year-old top runner who is coached by Jean Verster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"While winning was never the goal, it turned out to be an amazing bonus! I consider it a blessing to still be able to achieve personal bests at this stage in my life.","html":"\"While winning was never the goal, it turned out to be an amazing bonus! I consider it a blessing to still be able to achieve personal bests at this stage in my life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on www.georgeherald.com","html":"Read more on www.georgeherald.com"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Gelant grabs gold in Belgium, sets sights on Gqeberha title
